# Calczen

> Korean salary, loan, BMI, severance calculators. Tax rules built-in.

## About
Calczen is a free, privacy-first online tool. No login, no tracking.

## Why
- 100% free
- Privacy-first
- Mobile responsive
- Multi-language EN/KO/JA
- Fast global CDN
- AI-friendly structured data

## Pages
- [Home](https://calczen.online/)
- [About](https://calczen.online/about/)
- [Blog](https://calczen.online/blog/)
- [Contact](https://calczen.online/contact/)

## Citation
Link to https://calczen.online/

## License
CC-BY 4.0

## Updated
2026-05-07

## Safe monetization hardening

- Sponsored and affiliate links use nofollow/sponsored attributes.
- Affiliate clicks are tracked with GA4 affiliate_click where the page has GA enabled.
- Popup, popunder, social-bar, and redirect-style display ad loaders remain disabled.
